{{Quote|You Jedi act all prim and proper, but inside you must feel the same way I do about the lesser, nonhuman species.|Xor|<ref name="KotOR game" />}}
'''Xor''' was a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Slavery/Legends|slaver]] who fought in the [[Battle of Cathar]] prior to the [[Mandalorian Wars]], participating in the [[speciecide]] of the [[Cathar/Legends|Cathar]] [[Species/Legends|people]]. When the [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders]] [[Taris Siege|invaded]] the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Taris/Legends|Taris]] [[3963 BBY|twenty years later]], Xor [[Death/Legends|murdered]] a [[Juhani's father|Cathar male]] and eventually found the Cathar's daughter, [[Juhani]], on the auction blocks on Taris. However, [[Revanchist|Jedi forces]] [[Liberation of Taris|liberated]] Taris before the Twi'lek could purchase her. In [[3956 BBY]], during the [[Jedi Civil War]], Xor encountered Juhani—who was now a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]—as she was assisting the Jedi [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] during his search for the [[Star Forge]], a [[Rakata/Legends|Rakatan]] [[Space station/Legends|space station]] fueling the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire's]] war effort against the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Shortly after that meeting, Xor and two henchmen ambushed Juhani and Revan near the latter's [[Starship/Legends|starship]] ''[[Ebon Hawk]]''. The two Jedi defeated Xor and his allies, and the injured Twi'lek unsuccessfully attempted to goad Juhani into murdering him before he succumbed to the injuries dealt to him by Revan and the Cathar.

==Biography==
===Enslaving others===
{{Quote|Not everyone who fought alongside the Mandalorians did it for their stupid concept of 'honor.' Some of us did it just for the pleasure: the pleasure of seeing your world burn. But the treacherous beasts fought back and left me with injuries that meant I could never fight again… or so they thought!|Xor, to Juhani|<ref name="KotOR game" />}}
Xor, a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], was a [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Slavery/Legends|slaver]] who lived during the [[Restoration Period|time period]] after the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]. When the Mandalorians under the command of [[Cassus Fett]], who orchestrated the battle, [[Battle of Cathar|attacked]] the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Cathar (location)/Legends|Cathar]] in [[3973 BBY]],<ref name="KotOR CG" /> Xor participated by fighting and [[Death/Legends|killing]] many members of the local [[Cathar/Legends|Cathar]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. As he did, the Twi'lek took pleasure in the carnage, due to his [[Speciesism|hatred]] of the Cathar people. Although the Mandalorians nearly [[Speciecide|wiped out]] the Cathar, Xor sustained injuries during the battle that prevented him from participating in combat.<ref name="KotOR game" />

[[3963 BBY|Twenty years later]], Xor was involved in the [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders]]' [[Taris Siege|invasion]] of the planet [[Taris/Legends|Taris]] during the [[Mandalorian Wars]].<ref name="KotOR CG" /> At some point after that, Xor encountered and murdered a [[Juhani's father|Cathar male]] in the [[Lower City]], although his [[Juhani's mother|wife]] and daughter, [[Juhani]], were able to evade the Twi'lek.<ref name="KotOR game" /> [[3961 BBY|Two years later]],<ref name="KotOR CG" /> Xor saw Juhani and attempted to buy her from the auction blocks on the world. Before he could do so, the [[Revanchist|Jedi forces]] under the command of the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] [[Liberation of Taris|liberated]] Taris, freeing Juhani from [[Slavery/Legends|slavery]].<ref name="KotOR game" />

===Confronting Juhani===
[[File:Juhanihead.jpg|thumb|right|150px|Juhani hated Xor for his role in her father's murder and her species' genocide.]]
{{Dialogue|Revan|There is no emotion…|Juhani|There is peace. No, I will not do this. He may die, but it will not be out of my vengeance.|Xor|You coward! You weak… ahhh… gurk!|attr=Revan and Juhani's last encounter with Xor|src=<ref name="KotOR game" />}}
In [[3956 BBY]], during the [[Jedi Civil War]] between the Republic and [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Darth Malak's Sith Empire]],<ref name="KotOR CG" /> Xor encountered Juhani, who was now a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], as she was aiding Revan—who was formerly a [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] and was now a [[Jedi training/Legends|retrained]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]]—in his search for the [[Star Forge]], a [[Rakata/Legends|Rakatan]] [[Space station/Legends|space station]] that was fueling the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] war effort against the Republic. During his conversation with Juhani and Revan, Xor insulted the Cathar by trying to convince Revan to sell her to him. After Revan refused and Juhani threatened to kill Xor for his actions against her people, the Twi'lek vowed to confront them again and capture Juhani.<ref name="KotOR game" />

Xor and two cronies eventually ambushed and attacked Revan and Juhani near the former's [[Starship/Legends|starship]] ''[[Ebon Hawk]]''. However, the Twi'lek was mortally wounded by the Jedi, and his thugs were defeated. As Xor was dying, he tried to goad Juhani into striking him down, but Revan helped keep her from giving into her anger<ref name="KotOR CG" /> by reciting the first precept of the [[Jedi Code/Legends|Jedi Code]], which denied emotions and encouraged peace. Xor then died, angered that his death was ignorable.<ref name="KotOR game" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|So what would it take, Jedi, for you to sell your pet here to me?|Xor attempts to purchase Juhani from Revan|<ref name="KotOR game" />}}
Xor had [[Color/Legends|purple]] skin and [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and used a [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifle]] during combat. He hated the Cathar species and desired to eradicate or enslave them, and was among the Mandalorians who attacked the world for the pleasure of destroying it. He also viewed Cathar slaves as pets that were kept for the amusement of their owners. Although he was injured during the battle on Cathar, he continued to fight with the Mandalorians. Xor killed Juhani's [[Parent/Legends|father]] when he ran across him on Taris, and was prepared to purchase Juhani on the auction blocks during the Mandalorian occupation on Taris. When he later encountered Juhani and Revan during the Jedi Civil War, Xor talked disparagingly to Juhani and taunted her, even going so far as to ask Revan if he wished to sell her to him. After Revan and the Cathar defeated him during his attempt to capture her, Xor attempted to pressure Juhani to give in to her hatred and murder him. He also resented the Jedi for their role in hindering his acquisition of slaves during the Mandalorian Wars.<ref name="KotOR game" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Human_Xor.png|thumb|right|175px|Xor as a Human, from the Xbox version of ''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic''.]]
Xor was created as a minor villain by [[BioWare]] for the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''. He was voiced by [[Neil Kaplan]].<ref>{{IMDb|name/nm0438341/|Neil Kaplan}}</ref> In the Xbox version of ''Knights of the Old Republic'', the character is depicted as a [[Human/Legends|Human]]; however, he is a Twi'lek in the PC version. Some of his comments in-game seem to suggest that he was Human. However, Xor was officially [[canon]]ized as a Twi'lek in [[2008]]'s ''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]''. In the game, he appears only after the player has learned all that they can about Juhani's past through conversation. If the player visited the [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceports]] on the planets of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], [[Manaan/Legends|Manaan]], or [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]] with Juhani in their party, Xor would confront the group. Alternatively, the player can convince Juhani to give in to her anger and kill Xor.<ref name="KotOR game" /> He never appears at all if Juhani was killed on [[Dantooine]].

Xor is the only purple, male Twi'lek, and one of only two purple Twi'leks in Knight of the Old Republic, with the other being [[Yuthura Ban]].

==Appearances==
